name: qsdid-identity-auth
description: Production-grade authentication system for QSDID Platform combining FIDO-like crypto, Local Proof of Presence, Web3 wallet binding, and decentralized identity

scripts.demo:pqc: node -e "import('./src/services/postQuantumCryptoService.js').then(m => { console.log('✅ PQC Service loaded'); }).catch(e => console.error('❌', e.message))"
scripts.demo:lpp: node -e "import('./src/services/localProofOfPresenceService.js').then(m => { console.log('✅ LPP Service loaded'); }).catch(e => console.error('❌', e.message))"
scripts.health-check: node -e "import('./src/index.js').then(m => { const sys = new m.QSDIDAuthenticationSystem(); console.log('✅ System ready:', sys.getHealthStatus()); }).catch(e => { console.error('❌ Failed:', e.message); process.exit(1); })"

author: QSDID Platform Team
